column1: ## F1 — overall + per-pattern (v4 run × pattern grain; per-pattern total = total runs)

column11: Overall F1 0.958 across 150 runs × 10 patterns. TP=195 are analyzer detections the cohort accepted; FP=6 are rare survey rejections; FN=11 are patterns participants ticked as "intended but missed"; TN=1288 dominates because each run only writes 1-2 patterns out of 10. Algorithm reliability shows in the small FP and FN counts.

mid-familiarity pattern: 20 of 150 runs intended builder; analyzer caught 20 (recall 1.00). FP=0 is rare survey-rejection of correct detections; FN=0 is participants ticking "intended but missed" via the checkbox. TN=130 reflects runs where builder simply wasn't written and the analyzer correctly stayed silent.
